strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems including GIS platforms and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong advocacy for clean architecture, testing, and developer tooling with tangible open-source contributions
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff/Senior) suggest senior-level experience, but role requires junior/mid-level fit
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience — key required technologies not explicitly mentioned
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript and React, along with strong architectural discipline and open-source contributions, making them technically compelling — but their senior title, lack of stated PostgreSQL/Nest.js experience, and limited German proficiency raise concerns about role alignment and on-site integration.
